title: Foreign transactions reach fantastic figures, net foreign volume plunges to -1.66 billion shares
body: Foreign investors' stock buying and selling activities on Monday, November 25, set a record high, with a total of 10.24 billion shares purchased and 11.91 billion shares sold. As a result, net foreign volume dropped to -1.66 billion shares.

title: Prioritising core business, here's Waskita Karya's next year's strategy
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), a state-owned construction company, has decided to refocus its business strategy on its core operations: construction services, particularly in building, dam and irrigation projects, as well as roads and bridges.

title: Included in MSCI list, BRMS shares sought after by investors
body: Shares of PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) attracted the attention of foreign investors, following the announcement of the results of the rebalancing of the MSCI Indonesia Small Cap Index for November 25, 2024 yesterday.

title: Hapsoro now owns 5.73% of Sanurhasta Mitra (MINA) shares
body: On Friday, November 22, an individual investor by the name of Hapsoro became a new investor in PT Sanurhasta Mitra Tbk (MINA), a property developer in Sanur, Bali. Through PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk, around 375.97 million MINA shares were acquired, giving this investor about 5.73% of the shares.

title: BTPS plunges 44.91% ytd, foreign investors rush to sell
body: Foreign investors have been increasingly reducing their holdings in PT Bank BTPN Syariah Tbk (BTPS) over the past week, following a significant drop in the stock price since the beginning of this year.

title: Foreign transactions reach fantastic figures, net foreign volume plunges to -1.66 billion shares
body: Foreign investors' stock buying and selling activities on Monday, November 25, set a record high, with a total of 10.24 billion shares purchased and 11.91 billion shares sold. As a result, net foreign volume dropped to -1.66 billion shares.

title: Prioritising core business, here's Waskita Karya's next year's strategy
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), a state-owned construction company, has decided to refocus its business strategy on its core operations: construction services, particularly in building, dam and irrigation projects, as well as roads and bridges.

title: Included in MSCI list, BRMS shares sought after by investors
body: Shares of PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) attracted the attention of foreign investors, following the announcement of the results of the rebalancing of the MSCI Indonesia Small Cap Index for November 25, 2024 yesterday.

title: Hapsoro now owns 5.73% of Sanurhasta Mitra (MINA) shares
body: On Friday, November 22, an individual investor by the name of Hapsoro became a new investor in PT Sanurhasta Mitra Tbk (MINA), a property developer in Sanur, Bali. Through PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk, around 375.97 million MINA shares were acquired, giving this investor about 5.73% of the shares.

title: BTPS plunges 44.91% ytd, foreign investors rush to sell
body: Foreign investors have been increasingly reducing their holdings in PT Bank BTPN Syariah Tbk (BTPS) over the past week, following a significant drop in the stock price since the beginning of this year.

title: Foreign buy volume hit 5.70 billion shares, net foreign volume surplus at 414.50 million shares
body: Foreign buy volume on Friday, November 22, totaled 5.70 billion shares. One of the largest contributors to the high number of foreign buy volume was the acquisition of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which totaled 4.15 billion shares with a net volume of 404.65 million shares. Meanwhile, foreign sell volume was 5.28 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 414.50 million shares.

title: Converting bonds, Bumi Resources to issue 1.41 million new shares
body: PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI), a coal mining company, plans to issue 1,413,409 new series C shares through capital increase without pre-emptive rights, also known as private placement.

title: SuperDry Marine to pour IDR 50 billion into AMAN’s KEK HIPS
body: SuperDry Marine International, a cargo storage company, invests IDR 50 billion in Special Economic Zone of Halal Industrial Park Sidoarjo (KEK HIPS) managed by PT Makmur Berkah Amanda Tbk (AMAN).

title: BUMA International to acquire 51% of Dawson Complex
body: BUMA International, one of the subsidiaries of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), will take over 51% of Dawson Complex, a coal mining company based in Queensland, Australia.

title: Focusing on core business, UNVR to divest ice cream line for IDR 7 trillion
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR), the biggest Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) company in Indonesia, will transfer its ice cream business line to PT The Magnum Ice Cream Indonesia (TMCI).

title: YULE secures the Best GCG Practice Awards from IICD
body: PT Yulie Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (YULE) is recognised among Top 50 Midcap Public Listed Companies (PLCs) for the best good corporate governance (GCG) practices in 2024.

title: NRCA to divest 46.51 million treasury shares
body: PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk (NRCA) is divesting 46.51 million treasury shares starting from next week (3/12). These treasury shares originate from the buyback held from August 28, 2015, to March 18, 2020.

title: Low profit, WIKA still injects capital for SPAM Jatiluhur
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) has granted additional fund for PT Wika Tirta Jaya Jatiluhur (WTJJ) of IDR 18.99 billion, along with the issuance of new shares of WTJJ.

title: MR DIY goes public, eyeing IDR 4.71 trillion of fresh funds
body: PT Daya Intiguna Yasa Tbk (MDIY), a retail company known as MR DIY, will conduct initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 2.51 billion shares or equal to 10% of issued and paid-up capital.

title: Adhi Commuter eyes recurring income growth
body: PT Adhi Commuter Properti Tbk (ADCP) is eyeing recurring income contribution of 5% of its net profit in the past 5 years.

title: Expanding FTTH reach, WIFI to inject IDR 53.44 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI), a digital advertising and network infrastructure, has injected extra capital to one of its subsidiaries, PT Dharma Sinar Semesta (DSS), in order to promote business development.

title: Pouring out IDR 94.19 billion, ERAL acquires JD Sports Fashion in Indonesia
body: PT Sinar Eka Selaras Tbk (ERAL) has raised its ownership portion in a joint venture (JV) established alongside JD Sports Fashion Plc. (JD UK).

title: Debt-to-equity swap done, WSBP welcomes 9 shareholders
body: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP) has been concluding debt-to-equity swap with 9 creditors via private placement phase III last Wednesday (20/11).

title: POWR to issue global bond USD 50 million
body: Shareholders of PT Cikarang Listrindo Tbk (POWR) have agreed upon the issuance of Notes in a foreign currency worth USD 500 million.

title: Securing ASRRAT Gold Rank 4 years in a row, BNI shows solid sustainable finance commitment
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI has again won the Gold Rank award in the 2024 Asia Sustainability Report Rating (ASRRAT) event organized by the National Center for Corporate Reporting (NCCR).

title: Tower Bersama Infrastruktur eyes IDR 2 trillion in bond issuance
body: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBGI), a telecommunication infrastructure service provider, will issue Shel-Registration Bond VI Phase IV Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 2 trillion.

title: Eastspring ESGQ45 IDX KEHATI Index Fund launched, targets IDR 100 Billion AUM
body: PT Eastspring Investments Indonesia, in collaboration with Bank DBS Indonesia as the custodian bank, has launched the Eastspring ESGQ45 IDX KEHATI Index Fund.

title: CBPE pours IDR 85.71 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Citra Buana Prasida Tbk (CBPE) has injected IDR 85.71 billion in capital into its subsidiary, PT Talaga Ambara Nuansa (TAN), which will focus on the company's core business in property development.

title: Summarecon Agung's profit shot up 42.9%, optimistic in achieving marketing sales targets
body: PT Summarecon Agung Tbk (SMRA), a real estate management and developer issuer, has posted a net profit of IDR 933.71 billion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: TCPI will add 12 new fleets in 2025
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) will add 12 fleets by 2025 to boost revenue performance. The types of ships purchased include two pusher barge units, four tug boat units and six barge units.

title: Panin Sekuritas takes over 1.91 billion shares of Modernland (MDLN) from Honoris Corporindo
body: After purchasing 1.91 billion shares of property developer PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN) the day before, PT Honoris Corporindo Pratama instead transferred these shares to PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk on Wednesday, November 20. At last, this new investor now owns 15.29% of MDLN's shares, compared to Honoris's 13.6% shareholding. The securities of PT Panin Sekuritas were also used in both transactions.

title: Shareholders repo 55 million IMAS shares at low price
body: PT Sejahtera Raya Perkasa (SRP), shareholder of PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS), has sold 55 million IMAS shares with the aim of Reverse Repo.

title: As of October, transaction value of BRI shares reached IDR 266.26 trillion
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) recorded the highest transaction value in the capital market from the beginning of the year until October 2024 (year to date).

title: Over 1.4 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares sold, net foreign volume falls to -839 million shares
body: On Thursday, November 21, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were sold up to 1.43 billion shares, for a net volume of -267.24 million shares. These sales account for approximately 38% of the overall foreign sell volume, which stood at 3.73 billion shares. The foreign buy volume was recorded at 2.89 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -839.82 million shares.

title: Selling FILM shares at a discount, Tencent makes 140% profit
body: Image Frame Investment (HK) Limited, shareholder of PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FIlM), has sold 251,667,000 shares or 3% of FILM shares.

title: In London, RI achieved investment commitment of US$8.5 billion
body: The Indonesian government achieved an investment commitment of US$8.5 billion after attending the CEO Roundtable Forum at Lancaster House, London, England, yesterday (21/11).

title: Honoris Corporindo buys 1.9 billion Modernland Realty (MDLN) shares, increasing control to 29%
body: PT Honoris Corporindo Pratama, a stakeholder of PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN), increased its stake in this real estate developer on Tuesday, November 19. This investor enthusiastically acquired over 1.91 billion shares of MDLN right away, increasing the share portion from 13.6% to over 29%. In the meantime, Haiyanto actually decreased his holdings of MDLN shares by 3.74 million shares, bringing his total ownership down to 9.79%. PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk was employed to complete both share transactions.

title: Raising funds, Kredit Plus to issue IDR 500 billion bond
body: PT KB Finansia Multi Finance, the managing company of Kredit Plus, is offering Shelf-Registration Bond I Phase I Year 2024 of IDR 500 billion starting from yesterday (21/11) until next week (3/2).

title: Harita Nickel posted 17.8% revenue surge as of September
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL), commonly known as Harita Nickel, recorded a 17.8% year-on-year (yoy) revenue increase, reaching Rp20.4 trillion as of September 2024.

title: SGER signed 500 thousand MT coal supply contract of to Vietnam
body: PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk (SGER), a coal mining company, has obtained a contract of coal supply to Vietnam of 500,000 metric tons (MT).
